response: This medium-difficulty Thai Pad Thai recipe comes together quickly, with only 15 minutes of prep time and 10 minutes of cook time required to make a full batch that serves four people. Each serving of this beloved classic clocks in at 380 calories, with a balanced macro breakdown of 22 grams of protein, 45 grams of carbohydrates, and 12 grams of fat, making it a satisfying homemade alternative to restaurant takeout.
